creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

   There are two FATAL errors when check it with portlint.
Would you fix it and make portlint happy ?


wen




$ portlint
FATAL: Makefile: [227]: contiguous blank lines (> 1 lines) found.
FATAL: Makefile: [83]: USE_OPENSSL is set after including bsd.port.pre.mk.
WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/var/db/spamassassin".
WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/var/spool/spamd".
WARN: Makefile: extra item placed in the PATCH_SITES section, for example,
"PATCHLEVEL".
WARN: Makefile: "RUN_DEPENDS" has to appear earlier.
WARN: Makefile: do not set RUN_DEPENDS to ${BUILD_DEPENDS}. Instead,
explicity list out required RUN_DEPENDS dependencies.
WARN: Makefile: wrong dependency value for RUN_DEPENDS. RUN_DEPENDS requires
2 or 3 colon-separated tuples.
2 fatal errors and 6 warnings found.
